home.title: Got something a bit sus, mate?
home.subtitle: Chuck it in below and we'll give it the once-over — links, texts, emails and phone numbers.
footer.tagline: — always have a squiz before you act.
check.privacy: We don't keep your uploads or pass them to anyone — and we never open the links in your scam.
check.ocr.working: Having a squiz at your image — can take up to a minute the first go. Hang tight…
check.ocr.timeout: OCR is taking too long — try again or paste the text in yourself.
check.ocr.failed: Couldn't process that image — try a clearer screenshot or paste the text in yourself.
check.ocr.noText: Couldn't read any text from that image — try a clearer screenshot, mate.
check.shareCopied: Copied — flick it to whoever needs to see it
check.dropHint: On a computer you can also chuck a .eml file or screenshot onto this box.
check.forward.heading: On your phone? Just flick it to us
check.forward.body: Forward the dodgy email to {address} and we'll email you back a straight-up verdict. We read it on arrival and don't keep a copy.
check.placeholder: Paste the sus stuff here — link, number, text message, whatever you've got…
check.serverError: Strewth, something went wrong on our end. Give it another crack.
verdict.safe.label: Looks Alright, Mate
verdict.safe.sub: She's apples — no red flags. Still keep your wits about ya.
verdict.suspicious.label: Something's a Bit Off
verdict.suspicious.sub: Bit sus, wouldn't trust it. Don't engage until you've checked it out.
verdict.suspicious.step1: Don't click any links — track down the contact yourself
verdict.suspicious.step2: Don't hand over any personal or financial info
verdict.suspicious.step3: Ring the organisation directly using a number you found yourself
verdict.likely_scam.label: Scam Alert — Don't Touch It
verdict.likely_scam.sub: Bloody scammers. Delete it, block them, report it.
verdict.likely_scam.nextSteps: Here's what to do right now:
verdict.likely_scam.step1: Don't click any links or ring any numbers from this thing
verdict.likely_scam.step2: Block the mongrel and delete the message
verdict.likely_scam.step3: If you gave 'em your bank details, call your bank right now
verdict.likely_scam.step4: Report the scam to Scamwatch — scamwatch.gov.au
verdict.unknown.label: Couldn't Work It Out
verdict.unknown.sub: Not enough to go on, mate — trust your gut.
verdict.overall.heading: The verdict
verdict.breakdown.heading: What we had a squiz at
email.analysis.heading: Who really sent this
email.analysis.clean: No dodgy sender tricks in the headers, far as we can tell.
phone.wangiri.body: Scammers ring once and hang up. Ring back and you cop international premium rates. **Don't call back, no matter what.**
phone.spoof.body: Yep — scammers can chuck any number they like on your caller ID. Costs them nothing and happens all the time. Only the phone company knows the real source, and only the police can trace it.
report.stats: **{n}** scams dobbed in by Aussies so far
report.valuable: Your report's gold. Every one helps raise the alarm and keeps the next person from getting stung.
report.ids.hint: Grab any contact details so others can spot the same scam a mile off.
report.error: Strewth, something went wrong. Give it another crack.
report.success.title: Good on ya — you've helped protect others.
report.success.body: Your report's been logged. Every one helps warn the next person about this scam.
report.success.total: {n} reports lodged by Aussies like you.
subs.subtitle: Scams dobbed in by Aussies — unverified, anonymised
subs.empty.title: No reports match these filters, mate
subs.footer.cta: Check or dob in a scam →
bug.sent.title: Cheers — that helps us improve
bug.sent.body: Your report's been logged. Every one helps us make Just Checking, Mate more reliable.
bug.error: Couldn't send that just now. Give it another crack in a tick.
learn.tactics.intro: Nearly every scam runs the same handful of mind games. Spot the trick and the spell breaks.
learn.caught.intro: Don't panic, and don't be embarrassed — this happens to switched-on people too. Move quick, based on what you shared.
learn.handle.1: **Slow down.** No legit mob minds you taking your time to check.
learn.handle.5: **Block & delete** the mongrel once you're sure.
learn.report.body: Reporting helps the authorities warn others and put scammers out of business. This tool gives a best-effort check only — **it can't promise to catch every scam** — so trust your gut too.
